Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2 (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $71,091,594Details
International Box Office $36,362,313
Worldwide Box Office $107,453,907
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,653,181
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,835,506
Total $12,488,687
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart has earned a well-deserved vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter before she heads off to college. But safety never takes a holiday and when duty calls, Blart answers.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,762,435 (33.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$38,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,633 opening theaters/3,633 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $100,860,677

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 17th, 2015 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: April 10th, 2015 (Wide) (Germany)
April 10th, 2015 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
April 16th, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
April 17th, 2015 (Wide) (Venezuela)
April 17th, 2015 (Wide) (Mexico)
Video Release: June 30th, 2015 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some violence.

Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: Paul Blart: Mall Cop

Synopsis

After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart has earned a well-deserved vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter before she heads off to college. But safety never takes a holiday and when duty calls, Blart answers.
